In AutoValueProcessor and AutoAnnotationProcessor, change the case where the generated file can't be written from an error to a warning. This is an attempt to limit the damage caused by Eclipse bug https://bugs.eclipse.org/bugs/show_bug.cgi?id=367599. If the file can't be generated for some reason, compilation will eventually fail anyway since the reference to AutoValue_Foo from the user's source code won't be resolved.
